title: Artificial Fake Succulent Cactus Plant With Faux Cement Planter Pot
features: Bring the beauty and natural-looking greenery of succulent plants into your space without any mess or maintenance! These pretty miniature cacti are the perfect addition to almost any room in the house
Pop on the end of a shelf or nestle in the bookcase; place on a window sill or cluster together in the bathroom - wherever you display these little potted plants they are sure to add botanical charm
These artificial, but vividly realistic, succulent plants range in design and measure approximately 10cm
Each cactus plant comes in its own cement-look square planter, which is finished with a layer of mini pebbles surrounding the plant
Please note. This listing is for ONE potted plant which will be chosen and sent at random
description: Add a touch of greenery to your rooms with these chic mini artificial potted plants! This faux succulent cactus looks incredibly realistic and is great for bringing a bit of nature into your home without the worry of having to remember to keep it alive! Please note. These cacti come in an array of assorted designs - one plant will be selected and sent at random.
